description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a pigeon, featuring a plump, rounded body with a smooth gradient of gray tones across its feathers. The head is small and rounded, with a short, conical beak that is pale at the tip and darker at the base. Iridescent green and purple hues are visible on the neck, typical of urban Rock Pigeons. The wings are marked with distinct dark bands, and the tail is broad and slightly fanned with a squared-off end. The legs are thin and reddish-brown, ending in three forward-pointing toes and one rear toe, all tipped with small claws.
description: A realistic pigeon with gray plumage, iridescent neck, dark wing bands, and a short, pale beak.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded chest, symmetrical wings, and the beak centered above the reddish legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the iridescent neck, dark wing band, and the full profile of the tail and beak.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the broad back, symmetrical wings, and the squared, fanned tail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible iridescence on the neck and clear wing banding.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid gray with two dark wing bars, iridescent green and purple neck, and lighter underparts.
